channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [M&M] Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. Achieves All-Time-High Volumes in FY26 with 20% YoY Growth in SUVs and 13% in LCVs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd., one of India’s leading automotive companies, announced its overall auto sales for March 2026 with a growth of 21% including exports. The company sold 60,272 vehicles in the domestic market in the Utility Vehicles segment, a growth of 25% and overall, 62,109 vehicles, including exports. The domestic sales for Commercial Vehicles stood at 24,928, a growth of 11%. The financial year concluded with all-time-high volumes of 6,60,276 SUVs and 2,89,597 LCVs (<3.5T), delivering robust YoY growth of 20% and 13%, respectively, across both segments.

  • Mahindra achieved all-time-high volumes in FY26 with 20% YoY growth in SUVs and 13% in LCVs.
  • In March 2026, Mahindra sold 60,272 utility vehicles, a growth of 25% YoY.
  • Total vehicle sales in March 2026 stood at 99,969 units, a 21% YoY growth.
  • Domestic sales for commercial vehicles stood at 24,928, a growth of 11%.
  • Mahindra Farm Equipment Business sold 43,403 tractors in March 2026, registering a 33% year-on-year growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [NTPC] NTPC Green Energy Limited Subsidiary Declares Commercial Operation of 37.5 MW Solar and 13.2 MW Wind Capacity
item.description:
NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a subsidiary of NTPC Ltd, announced that its step-down subsidiary, Ayana Renewable Power Four Private Limited, a part of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group, has declared commercial operation of the fourth part capacity of 37.5 MW Solar out of the total installed capacity of 150 MW Solar Project located in Gujarat, and the seventh part capacity of 13.2 MW Wind out of the total installed capacity of 92.4 MW (Wind) and 37.5 MW (Solar) as part of 100 MW Hybrid Project located in Gujarat, w.e.f. 02.04.2026. This brings the total installed capacity of the NTPC group to 89,145 MW and commercial capacity to 88,065 MW.

  • NTPC Green Energy Limited subsidiary, Ayana Renewable Power Four Private Limited, declares commercial operation of 37.5 MW Solar and 13.2 MW Wind capacity.
  • The total installed capacity of the NTPC group stands at 89,145 MW, with commercial capacity at 88,065 MW after this declaration.
  • The commercial capacity of NTPC Green Energy Limited Group increases to 10,075.70 MW with the addition of these capacities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC LTD. | Category: Commercial Operation

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Ltd Announces Approval of All Resolutions in 35th AGM
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd, a leading manufacturer of API & Intermediate, announced the voting results of its 35th Annual General Meeting (AGM) held on 30th September 2025. All resolutions were approved by the members with the requisite majority. The meeting was held through Video Conferencing/Other Audiovisual Means (OAVM). The voting results will be available on the company's website.

  • Nutraplus India Ltd held its 35th AGM on 30th September 2025
  • All resolutions were approved by the members with the requisite majority
  • The meeting was held through Video Conferencing/Other Audiovisual Means (OAVM)
  • Voting results will be available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [BHAGIL] Bhageria Industries Ltd Delays Registered Office Shifting
item.description:
Bhageria Industries Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, has announced the deferral of its registered office shifting due to administrative and operational reasons. The proposed shifting, earlier approved by the Board of Directors for April 1, 2026, will now be implemented at a later date. The company will inform the stock exchanges once the revised effective date is finalized.

  • Bhageria Industries Ltd delays shifting of its registered office.
  • The shifting was earlier approved by the Board of Directors for April 1, 2026.
  • The delay is due to administrative and operational reasons.
  • The company will inform stock exchanges once the revised effective date is finalized.
  • This announcement is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bhageria Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DECANBRG] Sumita Mishra Acquires 2.40% Stake in Satani Bearings Ltd via Off-Market Deal
item.description:
Sumita Mishra has acquired a 2.40% stake in Satani Bearings Ltd (formerly known as Deccan Bearings Limited) through an off-market deal. The acquisition was made on March 23, 2026, as per a Share Purchase Agreement. The total shares acquired by Sumita Mishra amount to 4,79,602, which is equivalent to 2.40% of the total equity shares and voting rights of the company. The company's equity share capital and total voting capital remain unchanged at Rs. 20,00,00,000/- post the acquisition. The total diluted share and voting capital of the company also remains the same at Rs. 20,00,00,000/-.

  • Sumita Mishra acquires 2.40% stake in Satani Bearings Ltd
  • Acquisition made through off-market Share Purchase Agreement
  • Total shares acquired: 4,79,602
  • No change in the company's equity share capital and total voting capital
  • Total diluted share and voting capital remains the same post-acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DECCAN BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [OSCARGLO] Gopal Bhatter Acquires 12.54% Stake in Oscar Global Ltd via Off-Market Transactions
item.description:
Gopal Bhatter and Gopal Bhatter HUF have acquired a significant stake in Oscar Global Ltd through off-market transactions. The total shares acquired amount to 414112, which is 12.54% of the total share and voting capital of the company. The acquisition was made in three tranches on 25th March 2026 and 27th March 2026. The shares were acquired at a price of Rs.10 each, as per the Share Purchase Agreement and Open Offer. This acquisition makes Gopal Bhatter a significant shareholder in Oscar Global Ltd.

  • Gopal Bhatter and Gopal Bhatter HUF have acquired a 12.54% stake in Oscar Global Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through off-market transactions as per the Share Purchase Agreement and Open Offer
  • The total shares acquired amount to 414112
  • The acquisition was made in three tranches on 25th March 2026 and 27th March 2026
  • The shares were acquired at a price of Rs.10 each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OSCAR GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MAHABANK] Bank of Maharashtra Elevates Three Executives as Chief General Managers
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015, Bank of Maharashtra has announced the elevation of three executives as Chief General Managers. The appointed executives are Shri Devdatta Vitthal Rokade, Shri Arun Fanidhar Kabade, and Shri Milind Babarao Gharad. The effective date of their new roles is 1st April, 2026. Shri Devdatta Vitthal Rokade, aged 54 years, joined the Bank in 2004 as a Specialist IT officer and is currently heading Operations, Strategy, ABC & Resource Planning Departments. Shri Arun Fanidhar Kabade, aged 57 years, joined Bank in 1998 as a Specialist IT officer and is presently heading FMA & Credit Agriculture Department. Shri Milind Babarao Gharad, aged 53 years, joined bank in 2006 as a Marketing officer and is currently the Chairman of the Maharashtra Gramin Bank which is sponsored by Bank of Maharashtra.

  • Bank of Maharashtra announces the elevation of three executives as Chief General Managers.
  • Shri Devdatta Vitthal Rokade, Shri Arun Fanidhar Kabade, and Shri Milind Babarao Gharad are the appointed executives.
  • The effective date of their new roles is 1st April, 2026.
  • Shri Devdatta Vitthal Rokade is currently heading Operations, Strategy, ABC & Resource Planning Departments.
  • Shri Arun Fanidhar Kabade is presently heading FMA & Credit Agriculture Department.
  • Shri Milind Babarao Gharad is currently the Chairman of the Maharashtra Gramin Bank which is sponsored by Bank of Maharashtra.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF MAHARASHTRA | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KWIL] Unilever PLC Acquires 61.90% Stake in Kwality Walls (India) Ltd for INR 145,44,12,858
item.description:
Unilever PLC has acquired a 61.90% stake in Kwality Walls (India) Ltd from Unilever Group Limited, Unilever Overseas Holdings AG, Unilever UK&CN Holdings Limited, Unilever South India Estates Limited, Unilever Assam Estates Limited, and Unilever Overseas Holdings B.V. The total consideration for the transaction is INR 145,44,12,858. This acquisition was executed through a share purchase agreement dated June 25, 2025, and the shares were transferred on March 30, 2026. As a result of this transaction, the sellers, who were previously promoters of Kwality Walls (India) Ltd, have been reclassified as public shareholders.

  • Unilever PLC acquires 61.90% stake in Kwality Walls (India) Ltd
  • Total consideration of INR 145,44,12,858
  • Sale of shares by Unilever Group Limited, Unilever Overseas Holdings AG, Unilever UK&CN Holdings Limited, Unilever South India Estates Limited, Unilever Assam Estates Limited, and Unilever Overseas Holdings B.V.
  • Sale executed through a share purchase agreement dated June 25, 2025
  • Sellers reclassified as public shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KWIL | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DEEDEV] Dee Development Engineers' Subsidiary Biomass Power Plant Tariff Revised by 49.3% by PSERC
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dee Development Engineers Ltd. announced a Press Release on 01 April 2026 regarding the Punjab State Electricity Regulatory Commission (PSERC) order to revise the tariff for the 6 MW biomass power plant of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s Malwa Power Pvt. Ltd. (MPPL), for an extended term of 10 years upon expiry of the 20-year PPA period. The new tariff of ₹5.224 per kWh is substantially higher than the interim rate of ₹3.50 per kWh, representing an enhancement of approximately 49.3%. The Company is entitled to recover approximately ₹5.80 Crores for the period between May 2025 and February 2026. The MPPL's Biomass Pellet Plant is expected to commence commercial operations shortly, generating estimated revenue of approximately ₹23.40 Crores per annum.

  • PSERC revised the tariff for Dee Development Engineers' subsidiary's biomass power plant by 49.3%
  • The new tariff is ₹5.224 per kWh, significantly higher than the interim rate of ₹3.50 per kWh
  • The Company is entitled to recover approximately ₹5.80 Crores for the period between May 2025 and February 2026
  • MPPL's Biomass Pellet Plant is expected to commence commercial operations shortly, generating estimated revenue of approximately ₹23.40 Crores per annum

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dee Development Engineers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [POWERMECH] Power Mech Projects Secures ₹ 109.22 Crore Order from Hindustan Zinc Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Power Mech Projects Ltd has announced that it has secured an order from Hindustan Zinc Limited for the comprehensive operation and maintenance of a 91.5 MW CPP and transmission line. The contract, worth ₹ 109.22 Crores (Excluding Goods & Services Tax), is to be executed within forty-eight (48) months. The company will act as an independent contractor on behalf of Hindustan Zinc Limited.

  • Power Mech Projects Ltd has secured an order from Hindustan Zinc Limited for ₹ 109.22 Crores (Excluding Goods & Services Tax)
  • The contract is for the comprehensive operation and maintenance of a 91.5 MW CPP and transmission line
  • The contract is to be executed within forty-eight (48) months
  • Power Mech Projects will act as an independent contractor for Hindustan Zinc Limited
  • The order does not involve any related party transactions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Power Mech Projects Ltd | Category: Deals
